service.description: Create a tenant-scoped saved run backed by one RuleSet compare scope and zero or more initial rules.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: file1SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 1
file2SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 2

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1Schema, "file1SchemaFileName '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file1 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2Schema, "file2SchemaFileName '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file2 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1PrimaryIdExpression '${file1PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}'
file2PrimaryIdExpression '${file2PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}'

set.from: [ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleSetName: runNameValue, description: descriptionValue, version: '1.0', createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareScope
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, description: descriptionValue ?: 'Compare scope for ' + runNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_1', systemEnumId: file1SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: file1FileTypeEnumIdValue, schemaFileName: file1SchemaFileNameValue, recordRootExpression: file1RecordRootExpressionValue, primaryIdExpression: resolvedFile1PrimaryIdExpressionValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_2', systemEnumId: file2SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: file2FileTypeEnumIdValue, schemaFileName: file2SchemaFileNameValue, recordRootExpression: file2RecordRootExpressionValue, primaryIdExpression: resolvedFile2PrimaryIdExpressionValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: reconciliation.ReconciliationRuleEngineServices.save#Rule
service-call.in-map: [ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleId: ruleEntry.ruleId, sequenceNum: ruleEntry.sequenceNum, ruleText: ruleEntry.ruleText, ruleLogic: ruleEntry.ruleLogic, ruleType: ruleEntry.ruleType, expression: ruleEntry.expression, enabled: ruleEntry.enabled, severity: ruleEntry.severity, validateOnSave: false]

service.description: Create a tenant-scoped CSV saved run backed by one RuleSet compare scope.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
[ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, ruleSetName: runNameValue, description: descriptionValue, version: '1.0', createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareScope
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, ruleSetId: ruleSetIdValue, description: descriptionValue ?: 'CSV compare scope for ' + runNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_1', systemEnumId: file1SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftCsv', primaryIdExpression: file1CompareColumnValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.rule.RuleSetCompareSource
service-call.in-map: [compareScopeId: compareScopeIdValue, fileSide: 'FILE_2', systemEnumId: file2SystemEnumIdValue, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftCsv', primaryIdExpression: file2CompareColumnValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service.description: Create a reconciliation mapping from two saved JSON schemas and selected id field paths.

if.message: schema1Id and schema2Id must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema1, "Schema not found for schema1Id '${schema1IdValue}'", 'Schema 1 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema2, "Schema not found for schema2Id '${schema2IdValue}'", 'Schema 2 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: Selected schemas must use different systems

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, createdDate: nowTs, lastUpdatedDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.mapping.ReconciliationMappingMember
service-call.in-map: [mappingMemberId: mappingIdValue + '-1', reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, systemEnumId: schema1.systemEnumId, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftJson', idFieldExpression: schema1FieldPathValue, systemFieldName: schema1FieldPathValue, schemaFileName: schema1.schemaName, createdDate: nowTs]

service-call.name: create#darpan.mapping.ReconciliationMappingMember
service-call.in-map: [mappingMemberId: mappingIdValue + '-2', reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, systemEnumId: schema2.systemEnumId, fileTypeEnumId: 'DftJson', idFieldExpression: schema2FieldPathValue, systemFieldName: schema2FieldPathValue, schemaFileName: schema2.schemaName, createdDate: nowTs]

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, companyUserGroupId: newMappingMap.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: newMappingMap.createdByUserId, file1SystemEnumId: schema1SystemEnumId, file2SystemEnumId: schema2SystemEnumId, file1SchemaName: schema1.schemaName, file2SchemaName: schema2.schemaName, file1FieldPath: schema1FieldPathValue, file2FieldPath: schema2FieldPathValue]

service.description: Update configuration and, when provided, the executable rules for a tenant-scoped RuleSet-backed saved run.

if.message: file1SystemEnumId and file2SystemEnumId must be different
RuleSet saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: file1SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 1
file2SchemaFileName is required for JSON source 2

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file1Schema, "file1SchemaFileName '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file1 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, file2Schema, "file2SchemaFileName '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}' was not found", 'file2 schema is not available in your active tenant.')

if.message: file1PrimaryIdExpression '${file1PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file1SchemaFileNameValue}'
file2PrimaryIdExpression '${file2PrimaryIdExpressionValue}' is not present in schema '${file2SchemaFileNameValue}'

service-call.name: reconciliation.ReconciliationRuleEngineServices.save#Rule
service-call.in-map: [ruleSetId: savedRunIdValue, ruleId: ruleEntry.ruleId, sequenceNum: ruleEntry.sequenceNum, ruleText: ruleEntry.ruleText, ruleLogic: ruleEntry.ruleLogic, ruleType: ruleEntry.ruleType, expression: ruleEntry.expression, enabled: ruleEntry.enabled, severity: ruleEntry.severity, validateOnSave: false]

service.description: List saved runs across legacy mappings and RuleSet-backed CSV runs.
Rename one tenant-scoped saved run without changing its source or rule configuration.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, ruleSet, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found.", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

service.description: Delete one tenant-scoped saved run and generated outputs created for it.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, ruleSetRun, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mappingRun, "Saved run '${savedRunIdValue}' was not found", 'Saved run is not available in your active tenant.')

service.description: List mapping options and their system pairs for darpan-ui generic diff flow.
Load one mapping with editable schema and field details for darpan-ui settings workflows.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' was not found.", "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")

if.message: Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' does not contain any system members.
Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' requires saved schemas before it can be edited. ${mappingReadinessIssues.join(' ')}

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mapping.reconciliationMappingId, mappingName: mapping.mappingName, companyUserGroupId: mapping.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: mapping.createdByUserId, members: resolvedMembers]

service.description: Update an existing two-source mapping for darpan-ui settings workflows.

if.message: schema1Id and schema2Id must be different

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, mapping, "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' was not found.", "Mapping '${mappingIdValue}' is not available in your active tenant.")

if.message: Only two-source runs can be edited in this settings workflow.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema1, "Schema not found for schema1Id '${schema1IdValue}'", 'Schema 1 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireTenantRecordAccess(ec, schema2, "Schema not found for schema2Id '${schema2IdValue}'", 'Schema 2 is not available in your active tenant.')
darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for run changes.')

if.message: Selected schemas must use different systems

set.from: [reconciliationMappingId: mappingIdValue, mappingName: mappingNameValue, companyUserGroupId: mapping.companyUserGroupId, createdByUserId: mapping.createdByUserId, file1SystemEnumId: schema1SystemEnumId, file2SystemEnumId: schema2SystemEnumId, file1SchemaName: schema1.schemaName, file2SchemaName: schema2.schemaName, file1FieldPath: schema1FieldPathValue, file2FieldPath: schema2FieldPathValue]

service.description: Persist dashboard pinned reconciliation mappings for the authenticated user.
Persist dashboard pinned saved runs for the authenticated user.
Run the generic diff flow using text-based file payloads suitable for darpan-ui JSON-RPC calls.
Run a saved reconciliation flow backed by either a legacy mapping or a RuleSet compare scope.
List generated reconciliation diff outputs within the current active-tenant scope.
Retrieve a scoped generated diff output for direct download from darpan-ui.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Generated-output file name or safe data-manager relative path returned by list#GeneratedOutputs.

service.description: Delete one scoped generated reconciliation diff output file.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Generated-output file name or safe data-manager relative path returned by list#GeneratedOutputs.

if.condition: generatedOutputFile != null && generatedOutputFile.exists() && generatedOutputFile.isFile() && !darpan.facade.reconciliation.ReconciliationOutputSupport.canAccessGeneratedOutputFile(ec, generatedOutputFile, fileNameValue)
if.message: Generated output '${fileNameValue}' is not available in your active tenant.

set.from: darpan.facade.common.TenantAccessSupport.requireActiveTenantWriteAccess(ec, 'Your active tenant only has view access for generated outputs.')
